news.t: Three-Year Track Record of Harbor Human Capital Factor ETF Underscores Link Between Human Capital and Equity Performance
This ETF outperforms by stressing corporate culture — but not ESG
Harbor Capital Advisors Launches Second Corporate Culture ETF

holdings.infoBox: HAPI is an equity ETF with a total of 155 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 5.65%, Alphabet at 5.51%, NVIDIA at 5.30%, Apple at 5.29%, and Microsoft at 4.55%.

overview.description: The Harbor Human Capital Factor US Large Cap ETF (HAPI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Human Capital Factor Large Cap index. The fund tracks an index of large-cap US companies scored highly for their strong corporate culture contributions to financial performance. The portfolio is weighted by market-cap and then adjusted to meet sector neutrality. HAPI was launched on Oct 12, 2022 and is issued by Harbor.
infoTable: Human Capital Factor Large Cap index
